code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of food‑related triples into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Group triples by subject
    subject_triples = {}
    for t in triples:
        if t.subject not in subject_triples:
            subject_triples[t.subject] = []
        subject_triples[t.subject].append(t)

    # Predicate mapping for natural language
    predicate_map = {
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is from {o}",
        "ingredient": lambda s, o: f"contains {o}",
        "region": lambda s, o: f"originates from {o}",
        "division": lambda s, o: f"belongs to division {o}",
        "family": lambda s, o: f"family {o}",
        "order": lambda s, o: f"order {o}",
        "course": lambda s, o: f"served as a {o}",
        "dishVariation": lambda s, o: f"variations include {o}",
        "mainIngredient": lambda s, o: f"main ingredients are {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"led by {o}",
        "alternativeName": lambda s, o: f"also known as {o}",
        "creatorOfDish": lambda s, o: f"created by {o}",
        "creator": lambda s, o: f"created by {o}",
        "servingTemperature": lambda s, o: f"served {o}",
        "served": lambda s, o: f"served {o}",
        "carbohydrate": lambda s, o: f"{o} carbohydrates",
        "fat": lambda s, o: f"{o} fat",
        "protein": lambda s, o: f"{o} protein",
        "year": lambda s, o: f"introduced in {o}",
        "related": lambda s, o: f"related to {o}",
        "similarDish": lambda s, o: f"similar to {o}",
        "genus": lambda s, o: f"genus {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"language {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"part of {o}",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"currency {o}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"people are {o}",
        "capital": lambda s, o: f"capital is {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f"ethnic group {o}",
        "foundationPlace": lambda s, o: f"founded in {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"official language {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda s, o: f"leader title {o}",
        "servingSize": lambda s, o: f"serving size {o}",
        "class": lambda s, o: f"a {o}",
    }

    # Priority for ordering predicates
    food_predicates = {"mainIngredient", "ingredient", "dishVariation", "course", "servingTemperature", "served", "similarDish", "related"}
    geo_predicates = {"country", "region", "isPartOf", "capital", "leader", "currency", "demonym", "ethnicGroup", "language", "officialLanguage"}
    class_predicates = {"division", "family", "order", "genus", "class"}
    other_predicates = {"creator", "creatorOfDish", "alternativeName", "year", "carbohydrate", "fat", "protein", "servingSize", "foundationPlace", "leaderTitle"}

    def get_priority(p):
        if p in food_predicates:
            return 0
        elif p in geo_predicates:
            return 1
        elif p in class_predicates:
            return 2
        return 3

    # Build sentence from main subject first
    main_subject = triples[0].subject
    main_triples = subject_triples.get(main_subject, [])
    main_triples.sort(key=lambda t: get_priority(t.predicate))

    # Build main sentence
    sentence_parts = []
    first = True
    for t in main_triples:
        if t.predicate in predicate_map:
            if first:
                sentence_parts.append(predicate_map[t.predicate](t.subject, t.object))
                first = False
            else:
                sentence_parts.append(predicate_map[t.predicate](t.subject, t.object))

    # Add related subjects (like country, region info)
    for subject, tlist in subject_triples.items():
        if subject != main_subject:
            for t in tlist:
                if t.predicate in predicate_map:
                    sentence_parts.append(predicate_map[t.predicate](t.subject, t.object))

    if not sentence_parts:
        return ""

    # Combine into one coherent sentence
    if len(sentence_parts) == 1:
        return sentence_parts[0] + "."
    else:
        return ", ".join(sentence_parts) + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
